title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Malls

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Malls
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Nexus Malls in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
